top_signals.title: Russia wants to know if Trump has shifted his stance on Ukraine war after G7, Lavrov says - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Russia wants to know if Trump has shifted his stance on Ukraine war after G7, Lavrov says  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Rise Before Micron’s Earnings as Oil Slides: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks bounced after a rout driven by concerns over whether the unprecedented spending on artificial-intelligence will be justified, with traders gearing up for Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings report. Oil fell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETP outflows push rolling one-year flows negative for first time since 2023: K33
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin ETP holdings are down 8% from their peak, the largest drawdown on record, according to Head of Research Vetle Lunde.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Backup capital progress shows Takaichi is listening to JIP despite LDP concerns
top_signals.summary: A deal on the matter gave Takaichi the needed votes to become prime minister and form a ruling coalition.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
